basic_details.job_title: MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 23 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank Ltd. (MSC Bank), Mumbai has released the MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026 notification (Advertisement No. 06/MSC Bank/2026-2027, dated 20 June 2026) for 23 Cooperative Intern vacancies across the Maharashtra State Cooperative Bank Ltd. and 22 District Central Cooperative Banks in Maharashtra. MBA or 2-year PGDM graduates aged 21 to 30 years as on 01 June 2026 can apply offline from 20 June 2026 to 10 July 2026 till 5:15 PM. Selected interns will receive a consolidated monthly stipend of ₹25,000.

qualification.details: To be eligible for the MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026, candidates must have completed a full 2-year MBA or PGDM in specific management disciplines from an AICTE/UGC-accredited institution. Candidates who are currently pursuing their MBA or PGDM course and have not yet completed it are not eligible to apply. Additionally, computer proficiency is listed as an essential qualification alongside the management degree. | MBA or 2-year Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) in any of the following specialisations, from an institution accredited by AICTE or UGC: | Marketing Management Cooperative Management Agri Business Management Rural Development Management | Only candidates who have successfully completed the 2-year MBA/PGDM course are eligible. Those currently pursuing the course cannot apply. | Proficiency in computers is mandatory for all applicants. Candidates should preferably hold MS-CIT or an equivalent computer certification. | Also Read: MSC Bank Recruitment 2026 – 139 Posts | Trainee Junior Officer, Associate, Typist & Driver

salary_details.holidays: As applicable to the respective posting bank
salary_details.details: The monthly remuneration for selected Cooperative Interns is a consolidated ₹25,000 per month, paid by the respective State Cooperative Bank or District Central Cooperative Bank where the intern is posted. This is not a regular salary but a fixed internship stipend for the one-year duration. T.A.D.A. (Travelling and Daily Allowance) will also be provided by the respective posting bank.

selection_process: The selection process for the MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026 is straightforward - applications are accepted offline

and only shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview. Final selection is at the discretionary power of the Bank/Selection Committee. There is no written examination mentioned in the notification.
Step 1 - Application Screening: The bank shortlists candidates from the offline applications received based on eligibility criteria.
Step 2 - Interview: Only shortlisted candidates are called for a personal interview. The exact date and venue of the interview are communicated to shortlisted candidates directly.
Step 3 - Final Selection: The Selection Committee's decision on final selection is discretionary and binding.
Also read: SBI PO 2026 Notification PDF Out - Apply Online for 1
how_to_apply: The MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Apply 2026 process is entirely offline - there is no online application portal for this recruitment. Candidates must download the prescribed application form (Annexure-I) from the bank's website, fill it in their own handwriting, attach all supporting documents, and physically submit it to the bank's Mumbai head office before the deadline. Applications submitted after 5:15 PM on 10 July 2026 will not be accepted.
Visit the official MSC Bank website at https://msc.bank.in/career and download the Application Form (Annexure-I)

Fill the application form in your own handwriting with all required details including name, address, date of birth, educational qualifications, MBA/PGDM specialisation, computer proficiency, work experience, and references
Affix a recent passport-size photograph in the designated space and sign in the signature box
Attach self-attested photocopies of all relevant qualification certificates, computer proficiency certificate, and experience certificates (if any)
Provide details of two references - bankers, professionals, or government officials who are residents of India, holders of responsible positions, and not related to you
Place the completed application and all documents in a sealed envelope
Write "Application for the post of Cooperative Intern" on the envelope

Submit or send the sealed envelope to: The Joint Manager (OSD), HRD&M Department, The Maharashtra State Cooperative Bank Ltd., Sir Vithaldas Thackersey Memorial Building, 9, Maharashtra Chamber of Commerce Lane, Fort, Mumbai – 400001
Ensure delivery on or before 10 July 2026 till 5:15 PM

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026 is 10 July 2026 till 5:15 PM. Applications received after this time will not be considered.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available under MSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 23 Cooperative Intern vacancies are available — 1 at the Maharashtra State Cooperative Bank Ltd., Mumbai, and 1 each at 22 District Central Cooperative Banks across Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a completed MBA or 2-year PGDM in Marketing Management, Cooperative Management, Agri Business Management, or Rural Development Management from an AICTE/UGC-accredited institution. Candidates currently pursuing MBA/PGDM are not eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is a minimum of 21 years and maximum of 30 years as on 01 June 2026. This means candidates must have been born not before 01 June 1996 and not after 01 June 2005.

faq.question: Q5. What is the monthly stipend for MSC Bank Cooperative Interns?
faq.answer: Selected Cooperative Interns will receive a consolidated monthly stipend of ₹25,000, paid by the respective State Cooperative Bank or District Central Cooperative Bank where they are posted. T.A.D.A. is also provided by the respective bank.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two stages: shortlisting of candidates from offline applications received, followed by a personal interview. Only shortlisted candidates are called for the interview, and final selection is at the discretionary power of the Bank/Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q8. How do I apply for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode is offline only. Download the application form (Annexure-I) from https://msc.bank.in/career, fill it in your own handwriting, attach self-attested document copies, and submit the sealed envelope to the Joint Manager (OSD), HRD&M Department, MSC Bank Ltd., Fort, Mumbai – 400001, by 10 July 2026 till 5:15 PM.

faq.question: Q9. Does this internship guarantee a job at MSC Bank?
faq.answer: No. The notification clearly states that the internship is neither an employment nor an assurance of employment with the bank or any associated institution. No intern can claim any right of appointment by virtue of completing this internship.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration and leave entitlement for MSC Bank Cooperative Interns?
faq.answer: The internship is for one year. Interns are entitled to 10 days of Casual Leave (CL) for the year. Any other leaves are granted as leave without remuneration. Public holidays are available as applicable to the respective posting bank.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for MSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026 is 10 July 2026 till 5:15 PM. Applications received after this time will not be considered.
